dict.string: Maple needs access to selected desktop files and folders so it can import sources and write the local wiki workspace.
Maple needs access to selected document files and folders so it can import sources and write the local wiki workspace.
Maple needs access to selected downloaded files so it can import them as wiki sources.
Maple needs access to selected network volume files and folders when you choose a workspace or sources there.
Maple needs access to selected removable volume files and folders when you choose a workspace or sources there.
